revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[дЄБйЕЙ]] to [[Yin Fire Rooster]]
revision.text:
{{еє≤жФѓ}} '''дЄБйЕЙ'''пЉИгБ≤гБЃгБ®гБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгБЛгБЃгБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгВЖгБЖпЉЙгБѓгАБ[[еє≤жФѓ]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ

==дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ1гГї6пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[иЊЫ]]гГї[[дЄЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[8жЬИ]]гБМдЄБйЕЙгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[зЩљйЬ≤]]гБЛгВЙ[[еѓТйЬ≤]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•== дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[е§©дЄАе§©дЄК]]гБЃ5жЧ•зЫЃгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гБ≤гБЃгБ®гБ®гВК}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:дЄБйЕЙ]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:дЄБйЕЙ]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:дЄБйЕЙ]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''дЄБйЕЙ'''пЉИгБ≤гБЃгБ®гБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгБЛгБЃгБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгВЖгБЖпЉЙгБѓгАБ[[Sexagenary cycle]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}вЖµ'''" to "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''{{subst:PAGENAME}} also known as "
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ'''пЉИгБ≤гБЃгБ®гБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгБЛгБЃгБ®гВКгАБгБ¶гБДгВЖгБЖпЉЙгБѓгАБ[[Sexagenary cycle]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ

еє≤жФѓгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ34зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дЄЩзФ≥]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[жИКжИМ]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[дЄБ]]гБѓйЩ∞гБЃ[[зБЂ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[йЕЙ]]гБѓйЩ∞гБЃ[[йЗС]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|зЫЄеЙЛ]]пЉИзБЂеЙЛйЗСпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄБйЕЙгБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶37гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМдЄБйЕЙгБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''дЄБйЕЙгБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[37еєі]] *[[97еєі]] *[[157еєі]] *[[217еєі]] *[[277еєі]] *[[337еєі]] *[[397еєі]] *[[457еєі]] *[[517еєі]] *[[577еєі]] *[[637еєі]] *[[697еєі]] *[[757еєі]] *[[817еєі]] *[[877еєі]] *[[937еєі]] *[[997еєі]] | *[[1057еєі]] *[[1117еєі]] *[[1177еєі]] *[[1237еєі]] *[[1297еєі]] *[[1357еєі]] *[[1417еєі]] *[[1477еєі]] *[[1537еєі]] *[[1597еєі]] *[[1657еєі]] *[[1717еєі]] *[[1777еєі]] *[[1837еєі]] *[[1897еєі]] *[[1957еєі]] | *[[2017еєі]] *[[2077еєі]] *[[2137еєі]] *[[2197еєі]] *[[2257еєі]] *[[2317еєі]] *[[2377еєі]] *[[2437еєі]] *[[2497еєі]] *[[2557еєі]] *[[2617еєі]] *[[2677еєі]] *[[2737еєі]] *[[2797еєі]] *[[2857еєі]] *[[2917еєі]] *[[2977еєі]] |} ===еЗЇжЭ•дЇЛ=== *[[жЕґйХЈ]]2(1597)еєігБЃ[[жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|жЕґйХЈгБЃељє]]гБѓгАБжЬЭйЃЃгБІгБѓдЄБйЕЙеЖНдє±гБ®еСЉгБ∞гВМгВЛгАВ *[[е§©жЦЗ (еЕГеПЈ)|е§©жЦЗ]]6еєіпЉИ[[1537еєі]]пЉЙзФЯгБЊгВМгБЃ[[жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ]]гБМ[[еѓЊй¶ђ]]гБЂйЦЛгБДгБЯеѓЇйЩҐгБѓгАБгАМдЄБйЕЙгАНгБЃжЦЗе≠ЧгВТеРИгВПгБЫгБ¶гАМйЕКгАНгБ®гБЧгАБ[[дї•йЕКеЇµ]]гБ®еРНдїШгБСгВЙгВМгБЯгАВ
==дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ1гГї6пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[иЊЫ]]гГї[[дЄЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[8жЬИ]]гБМдЄБйЕЙгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[зЩљйЬ≤]]гБЛгВЙ[[еѓТйЬ≤]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•== дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== дЄБйЕЙгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[е§©дЄАе§©дЄК]]гБЃ5жЧ•зЫЃгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гБ≤гБЃгБ®гБ®гВК}} [[Category:еє≤жФѓ]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=}}.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=}}. Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rooster (дЄБйЕЙ) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dƒЂngy«Тu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: teiy≈Ђ ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongyu (м†ХмЬ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): ƒРinh DбЇ≠u

--> ==Years of Yin Fire Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 37 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Rooster (дЄБйЕЙ)'s years table''' |- ! === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rooster (дЄБйЕЙ) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dƒЂngy«Тu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: teiy≈Ђ ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongyu (м†ХмЬ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): ƒРinh DбЇ≠u

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|qq=|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
