<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dƒ≠ng-i≈Ђ]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:T√™n-y√ї]][[ja:дЄБйЕЙ]][[ko:м†ХмЬ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-Hahn]][[vi:ƒРinh DбЇ≠u]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-i√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄБйЕЙ]][[zh:дЄБйЕЙ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dƒ≠ng-i≈Ђ]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:T√™n-y√ї]][[ja:дЄБйЕЙ]][[ko:м†ХмЬ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-Hahn]][[vi:ƒРinh DбЇ≠u]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh_min_nan:Teng-i√Ї]][[zh_yue:дЄБйЕЙ]][[zh:дЄБйЕЙ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dƒ≠ng-i≈Ђ]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:T√™n-y√ї]][[ja:дЄБйЕЙ]][[ko:м†ХмЬ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-Hahn]][[vi:ƒРinh DбЇ≠u]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh_min_nan:Teng-i√Ї]][[zh_yue:дЄБйЕЙ]][[zh:дЄБйЕЙ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dƒ≠ng-i≈Ђ]][[de:Feuer-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de feu]][[hak:T√™n-y√ї]][[ja:дЄБйЕЙ]][[ko:м†ХмЬ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-Hahn]][[vi:ƒРinh DбЇ≠u]][[za:Dingyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-i√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄБйЕЙ]][[zh:дЄБйЕЙ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q201551]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=дЄБйЕЙ|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiy≈Ђ|p=dƒЂy«Тu|w=ting-yu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ iћѓ…§ Кћѓ¬≤¬є|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=t…Ы≈Л j…Рu|mc=t√¶≈Л j…®u|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л j…ѓ Ф|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rooster (дЄБйЕЙ) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dƒЂngy«Тu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: teiy≈Ђ ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongyu (м†ХмЬ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): ƒРinh DбЇ≠u

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–Ь–µ—В–∞–ї (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ng≈© (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (йЕЙ)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (йЗС)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (йЗС)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (йЗС)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events === * In [[:en:Keich≈Н|Keich≈Н]] 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion." * In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.
==Months of Yin Fire Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === йБЄжЧ• === The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire === Events ===
* In {{ill|Keich≈Н|en|Keich≈Н|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keich≈Н}} 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== йБЄжЧ• ===
The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events ===
* In {{ill|Keich≈Н|en|Keich≈Н|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keich≈Н}} 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}}) as applicable.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual === Events ===
* In {{ill|Keich≈Н|en|Keich≈Н|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keich≈Н}} 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== йБЄжЧ• ===
The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as дЄБйЕЙ''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|дЄЩзФ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|жИКжИМ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Keich≈Н|en|Keich≈Н|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keich≈Н}} 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keich≈Н Campaign|ja|жЦЗз¶ДгГїжЕґйХЈгБЃељє#жЕґйХЈгБЃељє|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keich≈Н Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|е§©жЦЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|жЩѓиљНзОДиШЗ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (йЕК) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== йБЄжЧ• ===
The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|дЄБйЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichij≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
